title: ClientNote
description: Represents a note belonging to a client matter. Notes can optionally be associated with other entities like documents, payments, or meetings through entity_uid and entity_type fields.

uid.description: Unique identifier for the note record

business_uid.description: Unique identifier of the business that owns this note

matter_uid.description: Unique identifier of the client matter this note belongs to

content.description:
The HTML or text content of the note. May contain HTML markup for rich text formatting (e.g., "
some note here
")

staff_uid.description: Unique identifier of the staff member who created this note

entity_uid.description: Unique identifier of the entity this note is associated with (e.g., document, payment, meeting). Null if the note is not linked to any specific entity.

entity_type.description: Type of entity this note is associated with. Possible values: document (note linked to a document), payment (note linked to a payment), meeting (note linked to a meeting). Null if the note is not linked to any specific entity.

summary.description: AI-generated summary of the note content. Null if summary has not been generated yet (status: null, in_progress, skipped, or failed). Present and up-to-date when status is generated.

summary_status.description: Status of the AI summary generation process. Possible values: in_progress (summary is currently being generated, wait before retrying), generated (summary completed successfully and is up-to-date), skipped (summary generation was not performed - user requested skip, content too short, or AI rejected), failed (error during generation). Null indicates a legacy note created before this feature or a note that hasn't been evaluated for summary generation yet.

created_at.description: The date and time when the note was created, in ISO 8601 format

updated_at.description: The date and time when the note was last updated, in ISO 8601 format
